title: Sith Marauder
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Marauder}}
[[File:SithMarauder-TOR.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A Sith Marauder of the Sith Empire during the Cold War]]
{{Quote|Is it battle that stirs you, to meet an enemy blade upon blade? Such is the way of the greatest of the Sith Marauders, who seek strength in war... and in rage.|Kreia|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Sith Marauders''' were [[Sith Warrior]]s who fought during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], the [[Dark Wars]], the [[Great Galactic War]], the following [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] and eventually the [[New Sith Wars]]. They specialized in dual [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] and dealing high amounts of damage to enemies in melee combat.

==Characteristics==
[[File:Sith_Marauder1.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A Sith Marauder-in-training stands guard in the Trayus Academy.]]
Sith Marauders were fueled by hatred, rage, and cruelty; the Marauders would typically use Force Rage when entering a battle, entering a battle fury fueled by the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. Thus, most Sith Marauders could duel any average [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] toe-to-toe and win.

==History==
Sith Marauders first appeared during the Great Sith War. They reached their climax in strength during the time of [[Kreia|Darth Traya]], [[Darth Nihilus]], and [[Darth Sion]]. Hidden in the [[Trayus Academy]] on [[Malachor V]], these warriors were trained in great numbers along with other Dark Jedi trained there. However, most of the Sith Marauders were wiped out, along with [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassins]] and [[Sith Master/Legends|Masters]], after [[Meetra Surik]] fought through the academy to confront Darth Traya.

Sith Marauders participated in the [[Sacking of Coruscant]] during the [[Great Galactic War]], engaging with many Jedi on the planet.<ref name="TOR">{{TORweb|url=media/concepts/sith-marauders|text=Concept Art – Sith Marauders|nolive=1}}</ref>

During the [[New Sith Wars]], the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] trained Marauders in academies on [[Sith Academy (Honoghr)|Honoghr]], [[Sith Academy (Gentes)|Gentes]], and [[Sith Academy (Gamorr)|Gamorr]].

==Behind the scenes==
In the game ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', Sith Marauder is one of the dark-side prestige classes that is available to a level 15 character. The class corresponds to the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light-side]] Jedi class [[Jedi Weapon Master]], as neither focus so much on philosophy and Force power as they do on battle.

Also in the game ''The Sith Lords'', Sith Marauders are encountered as [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]-wielding enemies, most notably on [[Malachor V]]. The player will have to face several of these foes throughout the Trayus Academy, finally defeating the lightsaber-oriented Sith and facing Darth Sion and Darth Traya near the end of the game.

A similarly named prestige class, [[dark side marauder]], first appeared in ''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]''. It later appeared in the multiplayer siege mode of the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' video game. It is not verified how similar these classes are, but they each share the same focus of combat over Force mastery.

The Sith Marauder is an advanced class for the [[Sith Warrior]] class in the ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' MMO video game.<ref name="Holonet-Sith Warrior">{{Holonet|classes|sith-warrior|Sith Warrior}}</ref> This advanced class specializes in the use of dual lightsabers and dealing greater damage in battle. The three skill trees for this advance class are Carnage, Annihilation, and Fury.<ref name="Fan Friday">{{TORweb|url=news/news-article/20100820-0|text=STAR WARS: The Old Republic Fan Friday (August 20, 2010)|nolive=1}}</ref> In the game, it is said that the Sith Marauder takes on the path of the Dark Lord of the Sith, [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]]. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] counterpart for this archetype is the [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Jedi Sentinel]].<ref name="Holonet-Jedi Knight">{{Holonet|classes|jedi-knight|Jedi Knight}}</ref>
